Awesome multiplayer game, but phone heats up quick even with a CUVR fan. Other than that, it's a must download. Add me RAM153.

reviews.review_title: Great game but where's the community
reviews.review_description: Great game. Like it another but there hasn't been anyone hopping online for a while.
Why are you looking at your character instead of looking AS your character, and I tried to play with a play station 4 controller, and it messes up the controlls and delays input. So kinda unplayable.

I'm on the S7 edge, this game is great to sit back and Co op play with ppl. BUT the sound is all messed up. It's like each Sound continues playing into infinity and over laps with other sounds. It's incredibly annoying and can't figure out how to make it stop. Completely takes away from what other wise would be a great game. Please help.
What's up with the music it's stuck .
Loved it

Great fun. Tried it with one friend online and it paired us up most of the time. Worked well with our controllers (one Oculus, one Beboncool). Only problem was we couldn't get the voice chat to work, I'd easily give it 5 stars if that was fixed.
Awesome game hope alot more up updates are done in the future to bring this game to its full potential

We had a lot of fun playing this...when we could manage to get in the same party. Parties are only formed randomly. If we could create our own party, I’d give it 5 stars.

I see some people had trouble with some gamepads. We used wired Xbox 360 controllers plugged into our Oculus Gos, which worked flawlessly.

Love this game except my phone tends to overheat when i play it. Also it becomes repetitive and starts to feel too easy to play. BUT it's  FREE and the resolution is really great compared to other free games.
I really like this game.  There really does need to be an option to change your viewpoint because enemies pop up in locations that can be hard to see.  Otherwise, please keep adding on.
Full of action and infinitely replayable
Best game i played in a while and its free!
In target you can get the moga pro is very good

reviews.review_title: Could be fun but nobody's ever playing
reviews.review_description: It's a fun game very well done but I played like 12 hours and never saw anybody online maybe because it is an old game kinda defeat the purpose

reviews.review_title: Great social fun! A lot of potential!
reviews.review_description: This really is a great game to play with friends and non friends alike! It can require some teamwork, especially if you're on a boss with only one teammate! I would give it 5 stars for what's available in the vr store now, but 4 stars for a game overall. Here are some suggestions: 1) Add a quick option to reorient the screen (double tap the touch pad, or select button). I find myself needing to reorient usually at the end of each match. 2) Create an easy way to friend people and choose who you'll play with. 3) Add more difficulty and replay-ability. Some options may include pvp, different difficulty settings, and contests (shoot the targets, whack-a-mole, individual survival mode where each player is on their own platform). I am rating this on day 2 of the release, but I think this game could be so much more! Kudos to the devs!

I love the multiplayer games like this, AW2, and wands. Nice progression system to keep you engaged, always learning new attacks as you level up. Also nice to not have to spin in circles for once to play a game. Nice casual vr for your couch :) beautiful as well
Love this game, hours of enjoyment (provided your phone doesn't overheat) if not a little repetitive.  Great replay value, though I wish there was more customization in regards to the avatar.

I tried playing, but for what ever reason my controls were backward. I pushed up on the stick and my character went down (towards me), push down and he goes away from me.  I could not find anywhere to reconfigure the inputs. Uninstalled... but it looked fun
